output.subject: Exclusive Upgrade Offer Just for You, Tom!
output.body:
Hi Tom,

Thank you for being a valued member of our family for the past 7 years! We appreciate your loyalty and want to enhance your experience with an exclusive upgrade offer.

As a premium subscriber currently enjoying your iPhone 14, we think you’ll love the new Apple Watch S9. This smartwatch is designed to keep you connected while providing advanced health and fitness tracking features, including ECG and blood oxygen monitoring. With its Always-on Retina display and safety features like Crash Detection and Emergency SOS, the Apple Watch S9 is not just a device; it’s a companion that could help keep you safe.

For just £22 a month, you can elevate your lifestyle and stay on top of your health and safety.

Ready to upgrade? Click here to secure your Apple Watch S9 today!

Best regards,
Your Telco Team

output.subject: Upgrade Your Plan for More Value, Priya!
output.body:
Hi Priya,

We hope you're enjoying your Motorola Moto G and your current plan! Since you’re using around 5GB of data each month, we wanted to share an exciting upgrade opportunity that could enhance your experience.

Introducing our Essential 20GB plan! For just £18 a month, you’ll get:
- 20GB of 4G/5G data, perfect for browsing, social media, and streaming.
- Unlimited calls and texts, so you can stay connected without worry.
- 3GB of EU roaming included, making it easier for you to stay in touch while traveling.

This plan offers great value for your everyday needs and is tailored for budget-conscious users like you.

Ready to upgrade? Click here to make the switch today and enjoy more data at a fantastic price!

Best regards,
Your Telco Team

output.subject: Upgrade Your Experience with the Samsung Galaxy S24!
output.body:
Dear Mohammed Al-Rashid,

Thank you for being a valued customer with us for the past 5 years! We appreciate your loyalty and want to ensure you’re getting the most out of your mobile experience.

Currently, you’re on a plan that suits your needs, but we have an exciting upgrade opportunity for you. We’d like to offer you the premium Samsung Galaxy S24 for just £48 a month. This device features a stunning 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED display, a powerful Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 processor, and an incredible 200MP main camera, perfect for capturing all your memorable moments.

With your monthly data usage of 28GB, the Galaxy S24 will provide you with an all-day battery life and fast charging capabilities, ensuring you stay connected without interruptions.

Ready to elevate your mobile experience? Click here to learn more about this exclusive upgrade offer!

Best regards,
The Team

output.subject: Upgrade to Unlimited 5G for Enhanced Connectivity!
output.body:
Hi Sophie,

We hope you're enjoying your Samsung Galaxy A54 and your current plan! As a valued customer for over a year, we want to offer you an exclusive opportunity to upgrade to our Unlimited 5G plan.

With the Unlimited 5G plan, you can enjoy:
- Unlimited 5G data, so you can stream, game, and work from anywhere without worrying about data limits.
- Unlimited calls and texts, keeping you connected with friends and family.
- 10GB of EU roaming included, perfect for your travels.
- Priority network access for a smoother experience.

For just £55 a month, this upgrade could significantly enhance your mobile experience.

Ready to take the next step? Click here to upgrade your plan today!

Best regards,
Your Telco Team

output.subject: Upgrade to the New iPhone 15 Pro, James!
output.body:
Hi James,

We hope you're enjoying your current plan! As a valued premium subscriber with us for over 3 years, we want to offer you an exciting upgrade opportunity.

You can now upgrade to the iPhone 15 Pro for just £55 a month. This device features the powerful A17 Pro chip, a stunning 48MP main camera with 3x optical zoom, and a ProMotion 120Hz always-on display. With its titanium build and all-day battery life, the iPhone 15 Pro is designed to enhance your experience, especially with your monthly data usage of 45GB.

Don’t miss out on the chance to elevate your mobile experience! Click below to learn more and upgrade today.

Best regards,
[Your Company Name]
